description: Pipeline for proposing security-oriented UI tests for the static Swag Labs app.

stages.name: Map attack surface
checks: List UI inputs and protected browser routes.
Exclude backend/API checks unless a real endpoint is discovered.
Choose tests that can assert user-visible security behavior.

stages.name: Create cases
checks: Cover login validation, route protection, logout/session clearing, and checkout input handling.
Use harmless payloads for XSS-style input handling checks.
Assert that payloads are displayed as text or rejected, never executed.
